extracted_traps.trap: Split source and built entrypoints created distinct instances of the same SDK model tag.
extracted_traps.avoidance: Define the tag in one canonical module, route root and subpath exports through it, and assert built ESM and CJS identity.

extracted_traps.trap: Publication recovery checked one comment page and held database locks across remote calls without an application deadline.
extracted_traps.avoidance: Paginate marker recovery and apply one bounded signal to the full remote publication interval while always releasing the reservation.

extracted_traps.trap: A lint exception used file-wide name presence instead of lexical binding visibility.
extracted_traps.avoidance: Resolve runtime bindings through enclosing lexical scopes and test unrelated sibling bindings separately.

misconceptions: Passing source suites alone proves package entrypoint identity.
An idempotency marker on the first page is sufficient recovery evidence.
A callback convenience automatically establishes a performance improvement.
optimizations: Store zero-parameter listeners directly and allocate wrappers only when bound parameters exist.
Keep the hot Controller.update path unchanged until a stable benchmark justifies extra ergonomics.
Use one ordinary typed tag mechanism instead of a tag taxonomy.

redaction_decisions.reason: The retained records contain repository design evidence and no credentials, prompts, production rows, or sensitive session context.

no_regression_evidence: Lite 223 of 223 and SDK core 54 of 54 source tests pass with clean typechecks.
Issue-triage 11 of 11 and direct production contracts 16 of 16 pass.
Root lint scans 112 files with zero diagnostics and alignment reports zero gaps.
Performance remains inconclusive and is not used as completion evidence.
explicitly_rejected_or_deferred: Rejected a speedup or full performance no-regression claim.
Deferred the managed npm package-export child-process harness to a compatible environment; direct built ESM and CJS identity checks passed.
Deferred MCP exposure, tag taxonomy, spawn, and worker-pool primitives until a concrete use case supplies fresh evidence.
